name: opencode-adapter
title: OpenCode-compat Bun adapter
description: Child C (depends on A+B): bundled Bun host child that loads OpenCode JS/TS plugins, maps OpenCode Hooks to the hya protocol, points the SDK client at hya serve, provides Bun shell, runs .opencode/plugins scan + npm install. Server hooks only; TUI surface excluded.
creator: cydia2001
